changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE user_account ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, email VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, last_login_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );

changeSet.author: codex
codex
